entries.title: Shared gold, UI & Options
highlights: Gold is now account-wide, not character-specific.
Added character-specific HP and MP auto potion sliders in the Options menu.
Added back the UI update with some changes.
Fixed character selection UI size issue.
Removed HP and MP flashing.
You can now toggle the Mir GUI or the Idle text-based GUI in the top right of the game window.
Mir GUI is automatically removed on mobile devices.

entries.title: Ice Hell, Glyphs & Ascended
highlights: Added Ice Hell wing to Hell Cavern.
Added more Glyphs.
BDD and all the other bosses can now be empowered.
Added Ascended mode. Like Empowered, but bosses drop even more.
Added new level 50 Heaven Armour.
Change Tao pet so it now teleports when out of combat.
Added Poison Cloud to drops.

entries.title: Fox Cave, late game & Glyphs
highlights: Added Fox Cave 1, 2 and KR.
Added Greater Fox Spirit and Fox items.
Rebalanced current late game items and armours.
Added new late game armour and weapons.
Added drops to Hell Guardian.
Added Plague to Dark and Dream Devourer drops.
Added Glyphs — 10% chance to drop from Empowered bosses. Only 7 in game at the moment while they get tested.
Fixed duplication bug (Thanks SmavidDavid).

entries.title: Codex, achievements & UI
highlights: Added Empowerments to the Codex.
Added new achievements.
Slightly moved the Sort button.
Added Testing Room to the trainer so you can measure your DPS.

entries.title: Boss souls & Spirit Box
highlights: New crafting recipe: IWT Soul — teleport directly to Incarnated Wooma Taurus.
New crafting recipe: IZT Soul — teleport directly to Incarnated Zuma Taurus.
New crafting recipe: DD Soul — teleport directly to Dark Devil.
New rebirth item: Spirit Box — save one non-Ethereal item between rebirths for 100 souls or 200 tokens.

entries.title: What's New
highlights: Patch notes are now in-game. Open Options → What's New anytime, or tap What's new on the update bar before you reload.
